reviews.comment:
Pequeña estación de servicio dentro del pueblo. Tiene una cafetería con lo básico. Los baños limpios. La atención correcta.

(Translated by Google)
Small gas station in town. It has a café with basic amenities. Clean restrooms. Decent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtX05yRUlREAE

reviews.comment:
Vieja Estacion de Servicio del ACA con una sola dársena de combustible y un Shop Café lindo. Claramente es para el consumo local, dado que esta lejos de la Ruta, no está a la vista...u la Regla de Oro de la mercadotecnia dice, que el producto debe tener exposición o visualizado por el potencial cliente (viajante). La nafta súper a $155.70, correctamente atendido por la señora playera.

(Translated by Google)
Old ACA service station with a single fuel bay and a nice little shop/café. It's clearly for local use, given its distance from the highway and lack of visibility... and the Golden Rule of marketing states that the product must be visible to potential customers (travelers). Premium gasoline was $155.70, and the attendant was very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtek5uWEl3EAE
